message:
chore(beads): Update last-touched timestamp

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';
+import path from 'path';
+
+/**
+ * Playwright configuration for HTML export E2E tests.
+ * Tests verify that exported HTML files render correctly in real browsers.
+ */
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: './e2e',
+  fullyParallel: true,
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
+  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
+  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  reporter: [
+    ['list'],
+    ['json', { outputFile: 'e2e-results.json' }],
+    ['html', { outputFolder: 'e2e-report', open: 'never' }],
+  ],
+
+  timeout: 30000,
+  expect: {
+    timeout: 5000,
+  },
+
+  use: {
+    baseURL: 'file://',
+    trace: 'on-first-retry',
+    screenshot: 'only-on-failure',
+    video: 'retain-on-failure',
+  },
+
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: 'chromium',
+      use: { ...devices['Desktop Chrome'] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'firefox',
+      use: { ...devices['Desktop Firefox'] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'webkit',
+      use: { ...devices['Desktop Safari'] },
+    },
+  ],
+
+  globalSetup: path.join(__dirname, 'e2e/setup/global-setup.ts'),
+});
